goal: Diagnose an 8/10 grasp-slip rate on the real G1 after training — point Tobias at zero friction DR and insufficient mass DR, not at a bigger network.
thoughts: Contact physics gap, not capacity problem. Real friction ~0.5 measured, sim mu=0.5 fixed = zero DR. Real mass varies +/-50%, sim only +/-10%. Asymmetric friction range 0.3-0.9 (skew low — slippage is the failure mode), mass 50-200% of nominal. Rigid sim contacts vs compliant real fingertips is the 2nd-order fix (next sprint, not this one). Visual DR is irrelevant for grasp slip — that is perception territory.
code:
# 1. Anchor in real sim-to-real grasp-slip patterns, not generic DR advice
lookup_knowledge(query="sim-to-real grasping friction mass domain randomization range asymmetric IsaacLab")

# 2. Inspect the material actually bound to the box/gripper contact pair
run_stage_analysis(scope="<GRIPPER_PRIM_PATH>")
check_physics_health()

# 3. Priors-aware range suggestions (NOT symmetric around nominal)
suggest_dr_ranges(
    params=[
        {"name": "box_gripper_static_friction",  "prior": 0.5, "asymmetry": "skew_low",    "range": (0.3, 0.9)},
        {"name": "box_gripper_dynamic_friction", "prior": 0.4, "asymmetry": "skew_low",    "range": (0.25, 0.8)},
        {"name": "box_mass",                     "prior": 1.0, "asymmetry": "symmetric",  "range": (0.5, 2.0)}
    ]
)

# 4. If a shipped grasp-DR profile matches, apply it rather than reinventing
apply_robot_fix_profile(profile="grasp_contact_dr", target="<ROBOT_PRIM_PATH>")

# Slack summary for Tobias (not a thesis):
#  1. Friction DR 0.3-0.9 skew-low (real measured ~0.5)
#  2. Mass DR 50-200% (real varies ~50%, not 10%)
#  3. Retrain 3 windows — fits before demo
#  4. Gripper compliance = next sprint, not this one
#  5. Visual DR not the issue — skip for now
failure_modes: Recommending a bigger network — it is a physics gap not capacity
Symmetric DR around 0.5 still misses the low-friction real failures
Visual DR rabbit hole — irrelevant for contact slippage
Gripper-compliance modeling now — blows the 3-window budget before demo
